item.title: Version 0.16.0
item.description:
SupaSidebar 0.16.0

What’s New

  • Space Color Tint: Each space now tints the entire sidebar with its color, giving you an instant visual cue for which space you’re in.
  • Slide Animation: The sidebar smoothly slides in and out when it opens or closes, animating in the right direction based on where it sits on your screen.
  • Active Tab Highlight: Your currently open tab is now highlighted in Live Tabs, so it’s always easy to spot where you are.
  • Dia Browser Support: Live Tabs now work with Dia browser.
  • Per-Space Browser: Each space can now have its own default browser. Links in that space open there automatically, regardless of your global setting. You can set this in Preferences > Air Traffic Control.
  • Privacy Blocklist: Keep certain sites or entire browsers out of Live Tabs and Recents. Add any URL, domain, or browser so your personal browsing stays private.
  • Quick Settings Menu: A new ••• menu in the top bar gives you fast access to common sidebar settings without opening Preferences.
  • Import from HTML & More Browsers: Import bookmarks from an exported HTML file, or bring in links from any Chromium-based browser — Brave, Opera, Vivaldi, and more.
  • SupaSidebar MCP: SupaSidebar can now be controlled by AI assistants like Claude. Search your sidebar, switch spaces, and open links — all hands-free using SupaSidebar MCP.

Improvements

  • Snappier Browser Tracking: The sidebar now reacts to browser window changes the moment they happen, instead of checking on a fixed interval.
  • Smart Folder Keyboard Navigation: Navigate smart folders with your keyboard, just like regular folders.

Bug Fixes

  • Sidebar Position: In draggable mode the sidebar no longer resets its position when toggled off and back on.
  • Locked Space: Fixed the locked space overlay navigating to the wrong space.
  • Auto-Tile Popups: Small browser popups no longer interfere with auto-tiling.
  • Glass Theme: Fixed a visual glitch in the Glass theme making the search and bottom bars appear darker than intended.
  • Safari Profiles: Fixed profile detection for users with 3 or more Safari profiles.
  • Command Panel: The search shortcut name now shows correctly in command panel suggestions.
  • Autocomplete URL: Autocomplete suggestions now show the actual URL, not just the site name.
  • Edit Link Sheet: Editing any type of link now opens the full edit sheet correctly.
  • Moving Subfolders: Moving a subfolder is now possible to another space.
  • Atlas Startup: Fixed a slowdown at launch caused by Atlas browser.
  • Safari Profile Language: Safari profile detection now works correctly regardless of your system language.
  • Import Permissions: The error shown when import lacks permissions now points to the correct system setting.
